text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Okay, our next training session is at 3 p.m. See you in six and a half
hours.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After an early morning training session, I walk with Eishin Flash to
class.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Did you hear? Best Crepe is gonna be at the gates after school!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: For real? That's super rare! We have to go!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Best Crepe...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It's a food truck for crepes—they don't have an actual store. Their
crepes have been all the talk amongst the students for about half a
year now.

"Take a bite, hear destiny calling."
They say words can't truly capture the taste.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
The owner does things on a whim, meaning the shop can pop up at
any time without warning. It's known as the "phantom crepe shop."

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: If those two are correct, it's coming here after school.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Well, mention of this crepe truck certainly got her in a talkative
mood.
choice_data_list: Why don't you go check it out?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Not possible. We have training from 3 to 8 p.m., and there's no
record of it ever staying that late.
choice_data_list: Then why don't we move our start time a bit?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
...No, we don't need to change anything. We've set our schedule, so
we should stick to it.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
That's the proper way of doing things. Now then, I have class in
fourteen minutes, so I should get going.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's still adamant as ever about sticking to her schedules, but she
doesn't seem all too happy about missing out...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Phew...
choice_data_list: All right, that's it for today.
All right, that's it for today.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Yes, thank you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Once our after-school sessions are over, we normally chat about her
progress, but...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I'll be heading out early today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She runs right off... Her eagerness reminds me of our exchange this
morning.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My guess turns out to be right—I find her in front of the school gates,
but there's no one else around.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Going by hashtagged posts on social media, it left somewhere
between an hour and an hour and forty-six minutes ago.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
...Best Crepe has come to the school three times now, and all three
times, it hasn't fit into my schedule.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This means more to her than I thought. But given how unpredictable
the food truck is, there's really only one thing she can do.
choice_data_list:
Next time, why don't you try adjusting your
schedule on the spot?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I know you're trying to be helpful, but I can't do that.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I am curious about it, but I can't let a simple curiosity throw off my perfect schedule.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Following it to the letter is what makes me stronger. So no, I can't
adjust it.
choice_data_list: As long as you're okay with that.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
...Next time, I'll try to find out when it'll be here before I make my
schedule.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Well, I'm going back to my dorm. See you tomorrow at 6 a.m.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's one of her best strengths—sticking to her beliefs no matter
what comes her way. Even so... I feel she could learn to treat herself
now and then.
